title: Ammunition Conservation
summary: Fire discipline to ensure ammunition lasts through extended engagements.
details: Ammunition is finite - running dry in combat is often fatal. Wait for high-probability shots rather than firing at maximum rate. Long-range shots waste ammo with low hit probability. Reserve ammunition for defensive needs. Track remaining ammunition and adjust fire rate accordingly. When below 30% ammo, switch to precision fire only. When below 10%, reserve for point defense.
annotations: Extended battles punish poor ammunition discipline.
Better to withdraw with ammo than die without it.
